content: Just adopted Bella from PawMatch and she has already become part of the family! 🐶 The adoption process was so smooth. Highly recommend this platform to everyone looking to adopt!
Reminder: Please vaccinate your pets! I just got my cats their annual boosters today. It takes 10 minutes and can save their lives. Let's be responsible pet owners! 🐱💉
Tip for new dog owners: The first 3 days after adoption are critical. Give your dog space, keep things calm, and don't rush introductions. By week 3 you will see their real personality bloom! 🐕
Lost cat in Dhaka Gulshan area! Black and white, answers to Oreo. Please DM if found. Sharing is caring 🙏 #LostCat #Dhaka
